scripts.e2e:web: E2E_AUTH=1 BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:${E2E_BACKEND_PORT:-4555} BACKEND_SERVICE_TOKEN=e2e-service-token AUTH_SECRET=e2e-auth-secret AUTH_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:${E2E_BACKEND_PORT:-4555} AUTH_CLIENT_ID=e2e-client AUTH_CLIENT_SECRET=e2e-client-secret NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:${E2E_WEB_PORT:-3000} next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port ${E2E_WEB_PORT:-3000}
